name: Feature request
about: Suggest a SpecWise workflow, CLI, or documentation improvement.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""

## Use Case

What problem would this help you solve?

## Workflow Fit

Where should this fit in the SpecWise workflow?

- [ ] inventory
- [ ] draft
- [ ] patch preview
- [ ] review report
- [ ] apply plan
- [ ] handoff pack
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] other:

## Safety Impact

How would this affect review-required, evidence-first behavior?

## External Calls

Would this require AI provider calls, coding agent calls, network access, OCR, vision, or other external services?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Maybe, needs design discussion
- [ ] Yes, describe the boundary:

## Proposed Shape

Describe the command, document, or workflow change you have in mind.
